aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.description: DEEIX Chat is a model access and conversation operations platform for multi-user AI applications. It unifies the model catalog, multi-provider routing, parameter governance, files and RAG, MCP tools, usage billing, identity security, audit, and operational settings in a single control plane.

updateTooltip.title: Update available
updateTooltip.description: Check updates to review the update dialog.

updateDialog.currentTitle: You are already on the latest version
updateDialog.currentDescription: Current version {current} is the latest published release.
updateDialog.availableDescription: Current version is {current}. Latest version is {latest}. Review the release notes before updating.
updateDialog.failedDescription: Could not get the latest version information. Check the network connection and try again.

accessDeniedDescription: You are not allowed to access this page
title: Users

table.searchPlaceholder: Search username, display name, email, or public ID

avatar.description: Enter an avatar URL or click the avatar area to generate a pixel-style avatar.

confirm.reset2faDescription: Clear this user's two-factor authentication configuration and revoke all active sessions? The user will need to bind it again next time.
confirm.revokeSessionsDescription: Revoke all active sessions for this user?
confirm.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes the user record and primary user data. It cannot be undone.

bulkConfirm.title: Confirm bulk action
bulkConfirm.description: Run this bulk action for {count} selected users.

passwordDialog.title: Reset password
passwordDialog.description: After this password is reset, the user must change it the next time they sign in.
passwordDialog.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters, not digits only

editor.createDescription: Create a standard user account with initial credentials and profile details.
editor.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters, not digits only
editor.preferencesPlaceholder: For example response style, language habits, output format, or common workflows.
editor.reasonPlaceholder: Record the reason for this status change (optional)

validation.nonFreeRequiresExpiry: Non-Free subscriptions require an expiration time.
validation.invalidSubscriptionExpiry: Enter a valid subscription expiration time.
validation.passwordMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters and not digits only.
